name: Norwegian Property ASA
summary: Norwegian Property ASA acquires, develops, manages, and sells commercial real estate properties in Norway. The company's properties primarily comprise office premises with associated warehousing and car parks, and retail and restaurant spaces. As of December 31, 2020, it owned 29 offices, and commercial and residential properties primarily in Oslo. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway. Norwegian Property ASA is a subsidiary of Geveran Trading Co Ltd.
